title: MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: ALBANY OFFICE MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides payee services. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Oregon Money Management Program (OMMP): Age 18 and older and very low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 812-2597 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 812-2597 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Geary Street and Hill Street in a 2-story red brick building Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - STAND BY ME PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
